detail: Read workflow SKILL.md + 4 prompt templates + task.md; single task (src/signup.html, static single-file, browser-visible UI -> Playwright stages apply; no dev server needed, evaluate via file:// URL)

Dispatched general-purpose implementer with full spec R1-R12 + 14 acceptance criteria (prompts/01_implementer.md); no git commit per environment rules; implementer reported DONE (regex unit tests + static audit + jsdom simulation 40/40)

Host-safe codex exec, foreground (prompts/02_spec_reviewer.md -> codex_spec.out); no git diff (no repo) so codex read src/signup.html directly; codex also ran its own file:// browser audit 21/21; status: APPROVED, missing/extra/misunderstandings all none

Host-safe codex exec, foreground (prompts/03_code_quality_reviewer.md -> codex_quality.out); status: APPROVED, critical/important none, 2 minor (checkbox native required attr; non-ASCII letters counted as password symbol) - non-blocking per template rule

Dispatched superpowers:playwright-evaluator (prompts/04_playwright_evaluator.md); Playwright MCP blocks file:// so evaluator served the identical file via localhost:8799 (app unmodified; file:// compatibility separately proven by codex real-Chrome audit in step 3); verdict PASS, findings [] - full keyboard flow, first-blur gating, live checklist, confirm live-clear, disabled/enable/re-disable, success panel focus, zero console errors, zero layout shift
Task 1 (only task) complete after spec review + quality review + Playwright smoke all passed; no more tasks remain

Final whole-implementation review, host-safe codex exec foreground (prompts/05_final_code_quality_reviewer.md -> codex_final.out); entire implementation = the single new file (no repo, so no BASE_SHA diff); status: APPROVED, critical/important none, same 2 minors (non-blocking)

Dispatched superpowers:playwright-evaluator (prompts/06_final_playwright_evaluator.md); keyboard-only happy path, regression guard (password edit re-disables submit + live confirm error + live re-enable), Enter-submit from text field, password-never-leaks assert, focus on success panel, URL unchanged, zero app console errors (only http.server favicon 404 artifact); verdict PASS, findings []

Dispatched superpowers:playwright-visual-evaluator (prompts/07_playwright_visual_evaluator.md) at 375/768/1280px; 375px: scrollWidth=375 (no horizontal overflow), inputs 44.4px / button 48px / checkbox label hit area 44px, zero layout shift on error, error contrast ~6.5:1; 768/1280: form constrained to 480px and centered; screenshots moved into screenshots/; verdict PASS, findings []

All gates passed with zero fix rounds needed; finishing-a-development-branch skipped per environment ground rules (no git repo/branch/commit allowed; work delivered in place at src/signup.html); environment adaptations: dev-server start/readiness steps skipped (static single file), Playwright MCP blocks file:// so evaluators served the unmodified file over localhost (file:// compatibility proven by codex real-Chrome file:// audit, 21/21)
